segments.speaker: 题目19/20
segments.text: Listen to an announcement on a University radio station. Good morning, students. I want to remind you about the new computer lab we're opening next week in Scott Hall. Have advanced graphic design software and high performance computers. This was a significant financial investment, so please use the lab safely and respectfully. Also be advised that the lab is replacing multipurpose room in Scott Hall, so it will no longer be available for club meetings. And such meeting rooms in the student center will still be available.
